title: Conophyllum scutatum
taxonomy: Conophyllum scutatum is a genus of extinct plants that belongs to the division Tracheophyta, which includes vascular plants. It is classified within the group of plants known as progymnosperms, a transitional phase between ferns and conifers. Further classification places Conophyllum scutatum in the order Voltziales, a group of ancient progymnosperms. This order is part of the class Cycadopsida, which consists of various progymnosperms and cycads. Conophyllum scutatum is considered a fossil plant from the Devonian period.
